name_en: 💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Leather Tri-Fold Wallet, Gucci continues to update colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This tri-fold wallet is crafted from Forest Green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest Green leather, palladium-tone hardware, double-G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
name_cn:
💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Leather Tri-Fold Wallet, Gucci continues to update colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This tri-fold wallet is crafted from Forest Green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest Green leather, palladium-tone hardware, double-G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
Model: 428726.
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Green/Full Leather.
Made in Italy
